skills.name: AI Config Skill
skills.description: Detect, create, sync, and drift-check AI assistant configuration files in a repo. Works with whatever the user already has. Never introduces a skill-owned state file.

skills.name: Auto-Test: Universal Testing Principles
skills.description: Core principles that apply to every automated test regardless of scope (unit, integration, e2e, contract, performance) or framework. Scope skills extend these; they do not replace them.
